scripts.dev: npm run dev -w @hartsystem/api & npm run dev -w @hartsystem/web
scripts.dev:stack: npm run db:up && npm run db:migrate && npm run dev
scripts.build: npm run build -w @hartsystem/api && npm run build -w @hartsystem/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @hartsystem/api && npm run lint -w @hartsystem/web
